@title ArenaEscrow
 @notice Trustless escrow for Arena Games.
 Primary flow (server needs ZERO gas / ZERO MATIC):
  1. Player calls deposit(roomId, entryFee)   — locks USDT into this contract.
  2. Game ends — server signs (roomId, winner) off-chain and sends sig to client.
  3. Winner calls claim(roomId, winner, sig)  — 85% sent to winner, 15% to house.
     Winner pays their own ~$0.01 gas to receive their payout. Fair trade.
 Refund flow (game abandoned):
  4. Server signs (roomId, "REFUND") and broadcasts to all players.
  5. Each player calls claimRefund(roomId, sig) — gets 100% back, pays own gas.
 Emergency fallback (if server goes offline):
  6. Anyone calls emergencyRefund(roomId) after 24h — 100% returned to players.
 Backup (if server ever has gas — optional):
  - release(roomId, winner) — server pushes payment directly
  - refund(roomId)          — server pushes batch refund

@notice Claim your winnings. Server signs keccak256(roomId, winner) off-chain.
         Anyone can submit the call but funds always go to `winner`.

@notice Claim your entry fee back. Server signs keccak256(roomId, "REFUND").
         Each deposited player claims their own share individually.

IERC20.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transfer","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"from","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transferFrom","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"ArenaEscrow","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Trustless escrow for Arena Games. Primary flow (server needs ZERO gas / ZERO MATIC):  1. Player calls deposit(roomId, entryFee)   \u2014 locks USDT into this contract.  2. Game ends \u2014 server signs (roomId, winner) off-chain and sends sig to client.  3. Winner calls claim(roomId, winner, sig)  \u2014 85% sent to winner, 15% to house.     Winner pays their own ~$0.01 gas to receive their payout. Fair trade. Refund flow (game abandoned):  4. Server signs (roomId, \"REFUND\") and broadcasts to all players.  5. Each player calls claimRefund(roomId, sig) \u2014 gets 100% back, pays own gas. Emergency fallback (if server goes offline):  6. Anyone calls emergencyRefund(roomId) after 24h \u2014 100% returned to players. Backup (if server ever has gas \u2014 optional):  - release(roomId, winner) \u2014 server pushes payment directly  - refund(roomId)          \u2014 server pushes batch refund","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/ArenaEscrow.sol":"IERC20"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/ArenaEscrow.sol":{"keccak256":"0xbea9c6dc1ab27609dfff3f21fdbc868cd93f9a69d484bb49cd39304be9969dd7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://70f756a2b811ae2dafd9a7f8b851248cc1c6b1f2ede01218f5a0bd99a2a1c70f","dweb:/ipfs/QmWEWcTQgtNeggeF1RmsngPV2Wc2oFDzk9KhCZvbVAkNui"]}},"version":1}
